headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Verisk Analytics (VRSK) After Recent Price Swings And DCF Insights
summary: If you are wondering whether Verisk Analytics at around US$210 a share still offers fair value or is starting to look expensive, you are asking the right question for this stock. The price has moved around recently, with a 17.4% gain over the last 30 days, a 2.1% decline over the past week, and returns of 4.9% decline year to date and 29.0% decline over the last year, which can change how investors think about its risk and potential. Recent news about Verisk Analytics has focused on its role...

headline: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Enters $1.5B Accelerated Share Repurchase Agreement With Initial ~7.0M Share Delivery
summary: Verisk Analytics Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSK) is one of the best NASDAQ stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On February 23, Verisk Analytics officially entered into accelerated share repurchase agreements to buy back $1.5 billion of its common stock. The transactions are being conducted with HSBC Bank USA and Wells Fargo Bank as the primary counterparties. […]
